title: tessaria integrifolia var. integrifolia
intro: Tessaria integrifolia var. integrifolia, also known as Matico, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tessaria integrifolia var. integrifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and potentially aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
